name: libnet-ssh2-perl
title: libnet-ssh2-perl
summary: Perl module for the SSH 2 protocol
description:
Perl module for the SSH 2 protocol
Net::SSH2 is a perl interface to the libssh2 (http://www.libssh2.org)
library. It supports the SSH2 protocol (there is no support for SSH1) with
all of the key exchanges, ciphers, and compression of libssh2.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnet-ssh2-perl because Perl module for the SSH 2 protocol.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnet-ssh2-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnet-ssh2-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnet-ssh2-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
